$comment: Xalq Sigorta brand palette. Hex values extracted from output/social/assets/xalqsigorta-logo-official.svg. Use these exactly; do not improvise replacements.

red.role: Brand red. Used in logo mark, accents, headlines on dark backgrounds, footer dividers. The defining color of Xalq Sigorta.

red_alt.role: Alternate red used in footer SVG. Slightly cooler; use only when matching the official footer asset.

charcoal.role: Logotype color on light backgrounds. Primary dark for typography on neutral surfaces.

ink.role: Deep black for legal/microcopy, dense paragraph text, footer text on white.

white.role: Reverse-out background for logo, headline text on photographic/dark backgrounds.

burgundy_fade.role: Suggested deepest tone for footer/edge gradient on photo backgrounds. Do not use as a fill - only as the dark end of a soft feathered gradient.

usage_rules: Never apply a heavy opaque red wash across the whole post.
Red is a brand atmosphere on photo backgrounds: dark burgundy at the edges, transparent toward the subject.
Footer fades use long, soft transitions - no visible linear edges or rectangular bands.
Brand red (#E31E24) is reserved for the logo mark, the contact-lockup phone icon, divider lines, and small accent elements. It is not a background fill.
Headlines on photo backgrounds are pure white (#FFFFFF) with a subtle dark gradient behind for legibility.
